LanguageData.YART_Settings_ReplaceTab: Replace vanilla research tab with YART (default: on)
LanguageData.YART_Settings_ReplaceTabDesc: When disabled, the Research button opens the vanilla research window.
LanguageData.YART_Settings_EraColor: Color cross-era research by its effective era (default: on)
LanguageData.YART_Settings_EraColorDesc: When a research requires a higher-tech prerequisite, it is placed in that higher era's zone. On: also color it by that effective era (matches the zone). Off: keep the research's own era color. Applies instantly, no rebuild needed.
LanguageData.YART_Settings_FocusDimming: Dim unrelated research on hover (default: off)
LanguageData.YART_Settings_FocusDimmingDesc: On: hovering a research dims everything not on its prerequisite/unlock path, like a spotlight. Off: only highlight the related path without dimming the rest.
LanguageData.YART_Settings_RebuildDesc: Regenerates the tree in the background.
LanguageData.YART_Settings_ExportGraph: Export research tree structure to Desktop (dev)
LanguageData.YART_Settings_ExportGraphDesc: Writes the research tree structure to Desktop\YART_layout_graph.json.
LanguageData.YART_Export_Empty: YART: no graph to export (rebuild failed or empty).
LanguageData.YART_BuildingHint: The tree is generated in the background.
LanguageData.YART_SemiRandomActiveDesc: Semi Random Research is active, so research can't be started or queued from here. Pick your next project from its "Next Research" tab.
LanguageData.YART_RequiredByExternal: Required by {0} research in other tabs:
LanguageData.YART_ClearTooltip: Clear the entire research queue on this channel.
LanguageData.YART_CannotStartYet: Cannot start yet: {0}\nPrerequisites or requirements not met.
LanguageData.YART_AllTabsTooltip: Show all research categories in one unified tree
LanguageData.YART_SwitchToVanilla: Switch to the vanilla research window
LanguageData.YART_SwitchToYART: Switch to the YART research tree
LanguageData.YART_ZoomTooltip: Click: reset zoom to 100%\nHome: fit whole tree on screen
